description: Cell A's UEs are showing degraded SINR with high RSRP from neighbour cells. Cell A's own configuration has not changed. Suspected cause: interference from a neighbour cell, possibly Cell C which had a recent power adjustment.
symptoms: Mean SINR dropped from 8.4 dB to 5.7 dB. Cell-edge UEs see strong RSRP from Cell C. Pct_poor increased from 18% to 41%. Ground hardware configuration unchanged.
